question: Starmer out before July?
textDescription:
Resolves according to this Polymarket:

This market will resolve to “Yes” if Keir Starmer ceases to be the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom for any period of time between September 14, 2025, and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

An announcement of Keir Starmer's resignation/removal before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal goes into effect.

The resolution source for this market will be the government of the UK, however a consensus of credible reporting will also suffice.
newsShortReason: Keir Starmer remains Prime Minister despite significant internal pressure and recent resignations.
newsKeyEvidence: As of May 27, 2026, Keir Starmer continues to serve as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom. | Despite calls for his resignation following poor local election results, Starmer has refused to step down. | On May 12, 2026, Starmer told his Cabinet he would not resign and intends to 'get on with governing'. | On May 14, 2026, Health Secretary Wes Streeting resigned and called for a leadership contest to oust Starmer. | Despite these pressures, Starmer has not announced any plans to resign before June 30, 2026.
